search_document:
User Request: Best selling products.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Best Selling Products
Type: chart
Description: Sales volume of top products
Title: Product Sales by Category
Type: table
Description: Sales performance of products categorized
Title: Total Units Sold
Type: kpi
Description: Overall units sold across all products

sql_queries.title: Best Selling Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalUnitsSold FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductName ORDER BY TotalUnitsSold DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Product Sales by Category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalUnitsSold FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName, p.ProductName ORDER BY c.CategoryName, TotalUnitsSold DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Units Sold
sql_queries.description: Overall units sold across all products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(Quantity) AS TotalUnitsSold FROM "Order Details"
